recommendations.director: Jerry Zucker, Jim Abrahams, David Zucker

recommendations.director: Jim Abrahams, Jerry Zucker, David Zucker

recommendations.title: Ghost
recommendations.overview: After a young man is murdered, his spirit stays behind to warn his lover of impending danger, with the help of a reluctant psychic.

recommendations.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
recommendations.overview: When the bumbling Lieutenant Frank Drebin investigates events following the shooting of his partner, he stumbles upon an attempt to assassinate Queen Elizabeth II.

recommendations.title: The Naked Gun 2½: The Smell of Fear
recommendations.overview: Bumbling lieutenant Frank Drebin is out to foil the big boys in the energy industry, who intend to suppress technology that will put them out of business.

recommendations.title: Jane Austen's Mafia!
recommendations.overview: After growing up poor in Salmonella, Vincenzo Cortino installs himself as the preeminent, if bumbling, Mafia don of the New World. But now he must pass on power to one of his two sons: either level-headed veteran Anthony or vituperative loose cannon

recommendations.title: Hot Shots!

recommendations.title: Welcome Home, Roxy Carmichael

recommendations.title: An American Carol
recommendations.overview: A cynical anti-American Hollywood filmmaker sets out on a crusade to abolish the 4th of July holiday. He is visited by three spirits who take him on a hilarious journey in an attempt to show him the true meaning of America.
